hooks.command: echo 'Doc ownership: docs/architecture.md owns the file map, tools, and scope; docs/decisions.md owns the gotchas; docs/roadmap.md owns the feature checklist; .env.example owns the env var list; README.md owns the front-door overview (setup, quickstart, how-it-works). A code change updates its owning doc in the same turn.'

hooks.prompt: If this session changed src/, patchright/, docker-compose.yml, or env vars, verify EACH owning doc for the kind of change made, independently — updating one does NOT excuse another: a new/renamed/removed file, tool, or scope change → docs/architecture.md (file map/tools/scope); a new non-obvious gotcha → docs/decisions.md; a shipped or materially changed feature/capability → docs/roadmap.md (mark [x] or amend the entry); an added/removed env var → .env.example. Block and name EVERY owning doc still missing its update (a shipped feature with architecture/decisions updated but no roadmap entry still blocks). Pure doc edits, test-only changes, and changes whose every owning doc was updated this session pass.
